Uses of Enum Class
org.egothor.stemmer.ReductionMode

Packages that use ReductionMode
Package
Description
org.egothor.stemmer
Provides the core Egothor-style stemming infrastructure based on compact patch-command tries.

  • Uses of ReductionMode in org.egothor.stemmer
